name: FortiGate Attack
description: Detects general attack events on the FortiGate system itself. This could indicate attempts to compromise the firewall.

prompts.prompt: A general attack event has been detected on the FortiGate system itself, indicating potential compromise attempts. Event Details: **Timestamp** {timestamp}, **Log ID** {log_id}, **Attack Type** {attack}, **Source Address** {source_address}, **Destination Address** {destination_address}, **Source Country** {source_country}, **Destination Country** {destination_country}, **Details** {detail}. Investigate this high-priority attack immediately to secure the firewall and prevent further compromise.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the attack event.

parameters.name: log_id
parameters.description: The FortiGate log ID for the attack event.

parameters.name: attack
parameters.description: The specific type or name of the attack detected.

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The source IP address of the attack.

parameters.name: destination_address
parameters.description: The destination IP address of the attack.

parameters.name: source_country
parameters.description: The country of origin for the source IP (enriched via GeoIP).

parameters.name: destination_country
parameters.description: The country of the destination IP (enriched via GeoIP).

parameters.name: detail
parameters.description: Any additional details or message regarding the attack.
